text:
now put these figures to use in the A.V. chart of the
Sun which has undergone the two kinds of correction. In
Mesa there are 3 dots and its multiplier 7. So the product is
21. Put this result in Mesa. As Vrsabha and Mithuna are
devoid of dots, the products are zero in each case. In Cancer
you get 20, Leo 30. Virgo 15, Libra 0. Scorpio 32, Sagittarius
27, Capricorn 15, Aquarius and Pisces zero. If you add up
these products you will get 160. After this subject the A.V.
figures after the two corrections again to the Graha-gunakara
i.e. multipliers for planets. This will happen only in those
Signs which are tenanted by planets. In Aries there is Mars
whose multiplier is 8. So multiply 3 by 8 and have the product
24 there. Next Rasi that has a planet is Virgo where is situated
Jupiter whose multiplier is 10. So put 3 x 10 =30. Next Saturn
is posited in Scorpio. Saturn's multiplier is 5. So 4 x 5-20.

278 FUNDAMENTALS OF \STR()IX)GV
Sagittanus is occupied by Mercury whose Gunakara is 5.
